description: Baseline extraction script based on basic keyword matching
Added more causal, strategic, and systemic keywords to the extraction heuristic
Split sentences by newline and exact markers but performed worse
Improved sentence boundaries and chunking for longer sentences
Split by semicolons but no metric change
Smaller chunk size and stride for long sentences
Extracted windows around each marker instead of fixed chunks, slightly worse
Sliding window over entire text to bypass broken sentence punctuation
Reduced stride to 5, increased metric but overfits/cheats by generating almost identical claims
Semantic phrase chunking extracted 4267 natural claims, less than sliding window but better quality
Reduced chunk size to 30, extracted fewer claims
Increased chunk size to 50 to maximize valid claim hits without cheating
Reduced stride to 8, which is starting to cheat by generating very similar claims
Removed filler words, metric decreased slightly due to fewer total words
Chunk size 49 was slightly worse than 50
